entries.source:
Chat Edit: '13	Stack Canaries	Insert mov rax, __security_cookie / xor rax, rsp / mov [rbp-8], rax in all mode entry points	GS violation triggers on overflow
14	Error Handling	CALL GetLastError → FormatMessageA → console output before any RET	Failed API calls print "Access Denied" not silent exit
15	Shadow Space	Ensure sub RSP, 32 exists before every CALL to WinAPI (kernel32, user32, advapi32)	No more 0xC00000FF (invalid stack)
16	RSP Alignment	Force RSP & 0xF == 8 before CALL using test spl, 0xF; jz skip; sub RSP, 8	All calls 16-byte aligned per MS x64 ABI
17	Bounds Check	cmp mode_idx, 10; jae InvalidMode before JMP [ModeJumpTable + idx*8]	Index 255 → "Invalid" not crash
18	Smoke Harness	Automated BAT script: launches each mode with valid/invalid args, checks exit code 0 vs 0xC0000005	Full regression in <30s'
